blur_detection.description: The text and edges are sharp with no signs of motion blur or camera shake.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No bright spots, reflections, or glare detected that obscure text.

water_stains.description: No signs of water damage, discoloration, or staining.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all important portions.

missing_sections.description: No parts of the receipt/invoice are missing or incomplete.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements block or obscure document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including the supplier, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, and item description line items. It represents a completed payment for telecommunications services.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 schema fields, including evidence of payment completed, actual amounts charged, and detailed item descriptions. It meets the criteria for being classified as an expense document.

line_items.description: Rata addebito modem TIM HUB+ Executive 11/48

extraction.special_notes:
Il calcolo dell'iva sulle singole voci potrebbe lievemente differire dal valore calcolato sull'imponibile totale.
Se indicata su questo documento, viene assolta in modo virtuale (Aut. Ag. Entr. MI 2 - n. 59560/2001). Se non è indicata, il documento è esente perché relativo a corrispettivi assoggettati ad IVA.
22%: Percentuale dell'imposta applicata a tutti i servizi di telecomunicazione
F.C.I.: Importi fuori campo IVA
Copia analogica di documento elettronico
Questo documento non è valido ai fini fiscali. In applicazione dell'art. 4, 205/2017, si informa che il documento elettronico in formato xml è stato trasmesso da TIM al Sistema di Interscambio (istituito con decreto del Ministero dell'Economia e Finanze 7 marzo 2008). Si comunica, pertanto, che il documento originale è messo a tua disposizione nella tua area riservata del sito web dell'Agenzia delle Entrate (agenziaentrate.gov.it).
extraction.terms_conditions: Richiedi la fattura online e risparmi il costo della copia cartacea della fattura. Puoi attivarla tramite l'area riservata MyTIM, App MyTIM o chiamando il 187. In alternativa, continuerai a ricevere la fattura in formato cartaceo e ti sarà addebitato il relativo costo.

issues.description: The invoice does not show the ICP company details (Global People s.r.l. or GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l.) as required for non-travel expenses.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Invoice must show Global People s.r.l., Via Venti Settembre 3, Torino (TO) CAP 10121, Italy VAT: IT12455930011 C.F: 12455930011 - The Local Employers name and details should appear on invoices, not the workers.

issues.description: The tax rate of 22% is applied to telecommunications services, which may have tax implications.
issues.recommendation: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: 22%: Percentuale dell'imposta applicata a tutti i servizi di telecomunicazione

issues.description: Additional information is required to ensure compliance with local regulations.
issues.recommendation: Receipts should be submitted with the same currency and clear exchange rate.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipts should be submitted with the same currency and clear exchange rate

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has issues with missing ICP company details, potential tax implications due to the applied tax rate, and requires additional information to ensure full compliance with local regulations.
